title: Create Design Token System and Theme Provider
description: Implement a comprehensive design token system in Tailwind CSS config and React context. Define all colors (portal-green: #39ff14, meeseeks-cyan: #5bcefa, rick-blue: #a8d8ea, morty-yellow: #f0e14a, backgrounds, borders), spacing scales, typography (monospace for code, sans for UI), shadows with glow effects, and animation timing functions. Create ThemeProvider React component.
acceptance_criteria: tailwind.config.js extends theme with all custom colors
CSS custom properties defined for dynamic theming
ThemeProvider context provides theme values to all components
Typography scale includes Inter for UI, JetBrains Mono for code
Shadow utilities include glow-green, glow-cyan, glow-blue variants
Animation utilities include portal-spin, star-twinkle, pulse-glow
agent_output: Design tokens implemented in index.css with all landing page colors, animations, and component styles.
